notes: v377 — Report-card grades now always reflect your FULLEST loaded market. Before, the server cached each day's grade by date alone, so if the first grade of the day ran while your market was only part-loaded, it could keep serving those part-loaded numbers all day. Now the grade is keyed by date AND how many shares were ready, so once more shares finish loading it re-grades on the fuller set (and identical reloads still stay instant). The numbers you see are computed the exact same way whether they run on your server or your device — this just makes sure the server is always using your most complete data. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5).
